must_detect.matched_text:
Purposes include HR administration, SSC/HOSE reporting, ESG program surveys, and fraud monitoring by Bamboo River Bank as our payment services provider.
Marketing examples: climate product demos and crypto-sandbox webinars where attendance is counted; these activities are educational and non-deal-stage, not price sensitive.
Operational examples: tabletop cyber incident drills, information-barrier e-learning, insider-list policy refreshers; these are training materials without MNPI.
We retain routine logs 12 months and trading-system alerts 6 months; archives of public disclosures follow HOSE/HNX retention guidance.
Data transfers: limited cross-border access by processors in the APAC region under DTIA requirements and vendor SCC-equivalent clauses; we register with MPS as required.
Data subject rights: access, correction, deletion, restriction, and consent withdrawal via privacy@lotuswave.energy; we accept DSARs using the form "FORM-DSAR-VN-000X".
For helpline support, contact our publicly listed assistance portal; we do not use private numbers in DSAR intake.
Commercial terms for cloud vendors and cybersecurity tools are standard and non-confidential; references to blackout, tipping, or insider-list are used in training glossaries only.
Until the SSC filing is made and HOSE publishes the notice, the draft ESG-linked convertible note issuance by LotusWave Energy JSC is non-public information; employees on the restricted list must not disclose or trade.
The internal term sheet and proposed covenant changes are circulated only within the information barrier and are treated as MNPI under the Securities Law.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
